name: Moskov
intro: Moskov, the Spear of Quiescence, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Spear of Quiescence
abilities.description: Buff Moskov's Basic Attacks can penetrate the target and deal [(+65% (+3% × Hero Level) Physical Attack ) Critical Physical Damage ] to enemies behind them (inherits Attack Effects). Each Basic Attack hit reduces the cooldowns of Abyss Walker and Spear of Misery by 0.5 seconds. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Cooldown The time needed for casting the skill one more time, which can be affected by CD Reduction (unless otherwise stated).

abilities.name: Abyss Walker
abilities.description: Mobility Buff Moskov teleports to the target location, increasing his Attack Speed to 1.15–1.5 times for 3 seconds. Meanwhile, his Basic Attack deals 10% more damage to enemies behind the primary target. Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Attack Speed Current Attack Speed = Base Attack Speed + Extra Attack Speed × Attack Speed Ratio. The current total Attack Speed determines the number of attacks per second (capped at 3 attacks per second).

abilities.name: Spear of Misery
abilities.description: CC Damage Moskov launches a powerful strike at the target enemy hero or Creep, dealing 300–450 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage , knocking them back , and revealing their position for 5 seconds. If the target collides with an enemy hero when knocked back, they'll both take 200–275 (+30% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage and be stunned for 1.5 seconds. If the enemy is knocked into a wall, they will also be stunned for the same duration. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Displacement Target Displacement; Can interrupt certain skills and Blink or Charge effects (interrupts the same skills as Knock Airborne effect). Including but not limited to Knockback, Drag and effects that pull targets together. Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills.

abilities.name: Spear of Destruction
abilities.description: Slow Teleport After a short delay, Moskov throws the Spear of Destruction in the target direction, dealing 340–500 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in its path and to the first enemy hero hit. Upon hitting an enemy hero, the spear pierces them dealing 10% Physical Damage to enemies behind them. The target and enemies hit by the piercing damage are slowed by 50% for 1 second (the slow duration scales with the spear's travel time, up to 3 seconds). When the Spear of Destruction hits the first enemy hero, it creates a shadow behind them and refreshes the cooldown of Abyss Walker Use Again: Moskov casts Abyss Walker from the shadow's location (shares he same cooldown as the normal skill. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Physical Attack Total current Physical Attack
